headlines.title: Democrats pick Nebraska Senate nominee who could drop out and back independent Dan Osborn
headlines.description: Cindy Burbank won the Democratic Senate primary in Nebraska, NBC News projects, potentially clearing the way for independent Dan Osborn to take on GOP Sen.

headlines.title: A third of Congressional Black Caucus could be wiped out by redistricting, Democrats warn
headlines.description: The Congressional Black Caucus is expected to dramatically lose membership because of the Supreme Court’s redistricting ruling.

headlines.title: Louisiana GOP lawmakers advance map eliminating one Democratic House district
headlines.description: Republicans in the Louisiana Senate voted early Wednesday to advance a new congressional map that would give the GOP another seat in the House from the state after a recent Supreme Court decision that struck down its previous lines

headlines.title: Trade, Taiwan and Iran cast shadows on Trump’s China summit with Xi
headlines.description: President Donald Trump will begin a two-day summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing on Thursday as the two countries engage in a fierce trade war and the U.S. conflict with Iran rages on.

headlines.title: President Trump arrives in China for high-stakes summit with Xi
headlines.description: President Trump was greeted in Beijing with a welcome ceremony ahead of his two-day summit with Chinese President Xi.

headlines.title: Kash Patel and Sen. Van Hollen Spar Over Excessive Drinking
headlines.description: FBI Director Kash Patel got into a heated exchange with Sen. Chris Van Hollen of Maryland when Van Hollen asked Patel about media reports of excessive drinking during a hearing on the agency’s budget.

headlines.title: How Trump's Summit in China Will Differ From His 2017 Visit
headlines.description: NBC Nightly News anchor Tom Llamas joins TODAY from Beijing to talk about what to expect from President Donald Trump’s high-stakes summit with China’s President Xi Jinping. He breaks down how the visit will be different from his visit nine years ago in 2017, why Trump is expected to ask for help in negotiating a Strait of Hormuz deal and what to make of the high-profile guest list that includes tech leaders Elon Musk and Tim Cook.

headlines.title: The cage match is on for tickets to Trump’s UFC fight at the White House
headlines.description: 4,000-plus spectators who are lucky enough, cunning enough or rich enough will score a seat to the UFC fight on the South Lawn next month.

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: The war is on hold, but Iran’s internal crackdown is only deepening
headlines.description: While the Iranian regime has been battling its external enemies, Israel and the United States, it has also been ramping up a deadly crackdown on those seen as the enemy within.

headlines.title: Police receive threat against Brad Raffensperger ahead of bomb scare
headlines.description: Brad Raffensperger, Georgia’s secretary of state, has faced threats after publicly disputing President Trump’s false claims that he won the state in 2020.
